Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

HANE/M 8, 326-327 [Sale of shares in butcher's prebend][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[mdUTU-SUR DUMU ša₂ md60-DIN-su-E DUMU ša₂ md60-DU-A A mGAL-d60 ina ḫu-ud] lib₃*-bi-šu₂ šal-šu₂

o 22

[ša₂ u₄-mu ina U₄ 1-KAM₂ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA-šu₂ lu₂GIR₂.LA₂u₂-tu₂ IGI d60 an-tu₄] dINANA dGAŠAN-EDIN

o 33

[dna-na-a dGAŠAN-ša₂-SAG dšar-ra-ḫi-i-tu₄ u DINGIR]-⸢MEŠ⸣ E₂-šu₂-nu gab-bi

o 44

[ša₂ ITIus-su kal MU.AN.NA gu-uq-qa-ne₂-e U₄].⸢EŠ₃⸣.EŠ₃-MEŠ u mim-ma gab-bi ša₂ a-na

o 55

⸢GIŠ⸣.[ŠUB.BA MU-MEŠ] ⸢ik*-kaš-ši-du ša₂⸣ [KI lu₂]⸢EN* ḪA*.LA⸣-MEŠ-šu₂ gab-bi a-na 2 MA.NA 18 GIN₂

o 66

KU₃.BABBAR is-ta-tir-ra-nu ša₂ mse-lu-ku bab-ba-nu-u₂-tu₂ a-na ŠAM₂ TIL-MEŠ a-na

o 77

md60-NUMUN-MU DUMU ša₂ mla-ba-a-ši DUMU ša₂ md60-⸢NUMUN⸣-[MU A] ⸢m*E₂*.KUR⸣-za-kir a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂

o 88

it-ta-din KU₃.BABBAR a₄ 2 MA.NA 18 GIN₂ [ŠAM₂] ⸢GIŠ.ŠUB.BA MU-MEŠ⸣ m*d*UTU-SUR

o 99

DUMU ša₂ md60-DIN-su-E ina ŠU-MIN md60-NUMUN-⸢MU⸣ DUMU ša₂ mla-⸢ba-a⸣-ši ma-⸢ḫir e⸣-ṭir₃ u₄-mu

o 1010

pa-qa-ri ana muḫ-ḫi šal-šu₂ ša₂ ⸢u₄-mu⸣ ina U₄ 1-KAM₂ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA lu₂GIR₂.LA₂u₂-tu₂ MU-MEŠ

o 1111

it-tab-šu-u₂ mki-⸢din-d60 DUMU ša₂ m⸣d60-ŠEŠ-MUnu DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu

o 1212

A mḫun-zu-u₂ u₂-[mar]-⸢raq⸣-ma a-di 12-TA.AM₃ a-na md60-NUMUN-MU DUMU ša₂ mla-ba-a-ši

o 1313

a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ ina-an-din pu-u₂-ut a-ḫa-miš a-na mu-ru-qu ša₂ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA

o 1414

MU-MEŠ ⸢mdUTU⸣-SUR DUMU ša₂ md60-DIN-su-E u₃ mki-din-d60 DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu

o 1515

⸢a-na*⸣ [u₄-mu ṣa]-a-tu₂ na-šu-u₂ šal-šu₂ ša₂ u₄-mu ina U₄ 1-KAM₂ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA

o 1616

[lu₂GIR₂.LA₂u₂-tu₂] ⸢MU*⸣-MEŠ ša₂ md60-NUMUN-MU DUMU ša₂ mla-ba-ši DUMU ša₂ md60-NUMUN-⸢MU⸣

o 1717

[A mE₂.KUR-za-kir] ⸢a*⸣-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ šu₂-nu u₄-mu ma-la md60-⸢NUMUN⸣-[MU]

o 1818

[ṣe-bu-u₂ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA] ⸢MU-MEŠ ina gišDA⸣ ša₂ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA-MEŠ ša₂ ina E₂ DINGIR-⸢MEŠ⸣ ina MU-šu₂

Reverse
r 1r 1

u₂-šal-lim*

(witnesses)
r 22

lu₂mu-kin₇

r 33

md60-NUMUN-MU u₃ md60-MU-GIŠ DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mša₂-d60-iš-šu-u₂ A mḫun-zu-⸢u₂⸣ [md60-DU-A DUMU ša₂]

r 44

mdINANA-MU-KAM₂ A mḫun-zu-u₂ mdna-na-a-MU u₃ md⸢60⸣-[ik-ṣur DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mtat]-⸢tan⸣-nu

r 55

A mE₂.KUR-za-kir m⸢ta-nit⸣-tu₄-d60 DUMU ša₂ mni-din-⸢tu₄-d⸣[60 A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu]

r 66

mdUTU-MUnu ⸢u₃⸣ mana-GAL-d60 DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ md60-AD-URI₃ ⸢A m⸣[lu-uš-tam-mar-dIŠKUR]

r 77

md60-DINiṭ DUMU ša₂ mki-din-d60 A mlu-uš-tam-mar-d⸢IŠKUR⸣ [mta-nit-tu₄-d60 DUMU ša₂]

r 88

mki-din-d60 A mḫun-zu-u₂ mBAD₄-dGAŠAN DUMU ša₂ m⸢d⸣[na-na-a-MU]

r 99

⸢m⸣lu-uš-tam-mar-d⸢IŠKUR⸣ md60-DINiṭ DUMU ša₂ mba-as-⸢si⸣-[ia A mE₂.KUR-za-kir]

r 1010

[md]⸢60⸣-AD-URI₃ DUMU ša₂ md60-DU-A A mŠU-d60 mdna*-[na-a-MU DUMU ša₂ md60-DUMU-MUnu]

r 1111

[A mḫun]-⸢zu-u₂⸣

(colophon)
r 1212

[mdum-qi₂-d60 lu₂UMBISAG DUMU ša₂ md60-DINiṭ A m]⸢d*⸣30-TI-ER₂ UNUG⸢ki*⸣

r 1313

[itiŠE U₄ 2-KAM₂ MU 86-KAM₂ m]⸢si⸣-lu-ku ⸢LUGAL⸣
